Faith & Memorial

Forever With Us
Memorial Candles

A gentle light to honor someone you've loved and lost. Handcrafted with meaning, made to last.

$40
With Engraved Lid
Glass candle + custom engraved bamboo lid
$30
Candle Only

Choose your candle design & lid design separately — every combination is available.

What makes it special

Three crafts.
One meaningful piece.

The Forever With Us candle isn't just one thing — it's three crafts combined into a single, lasting tribute. The frosted glass is sublimation printed with a heartfelt design. The bamboo lid is laser engraved with a custom memorial motif. And inside, a warm LED light brings it all to life.

No flame. No worry. Just a gentle, lasting glow that sits beautifully on any shelf, nightstand, or memorial space.

  • Frosted glass with sublimation-printed design
  • Custom laser-engraved bamboo lid
  • Warm LED light included
  • 4 candle designs available
  • 5 lid designs available — including pet memorials
  • Mix and match any combination

Hover or tap to see it lit up
